name: Breast Cancer Synoptic Report
description: Synoptic pathology report template for breast cancer

findings.technique: Core needle biopsy / Surgical excision specimen submitted for pathological examination. Specimen labeled with [clinical information].

sections.name: Specimen Type
sections.content: Specimen type: [Core needle biopsy / Lumpectomy / Mastectomy / Sentinel lymph node dissection]

sections.name: Tumor Type
sections.content: Histologic type: [Infiltrating ductal carcinoma / Infiltrating lobular carcinoma / Ductal carcinoma in situ / Other]. Grade: [1/2/3] (Bloom-Richardson). Mitotic count: [X] per 10 HPF.

sections.name: Tumor Size
sections.content: Invasive tumor size: [X]cm. [DCIS component: present/absent]. Extent: [X]% of tumor area.

sections.name: Margins
sections.content: Margins: [Negative / Close (<2mm) / Positive] for invasive carcinoma. [Negative / Close / Positive] for DCIS. [Ink margin: involved by X mm].

sections.name: Lymph Nodes
sections.content: Lymph nodes: [X] examined. [X] positive for metastasis. [Extranodal extension: present/absent]. Largest metastasis: [X]cm.

sections.name: Biomarkers
sections.content: ER: [Positive (X%) / Negative]. PR: [Positive (X%) / Negative]. HER2: [Positive (3+) / Equivocal (2+) / Negative (0-1+)]. Ki-67 proliferation index: [X]%.

sections.name: Additional Findings
sections.content: Lymphovascular invasion: [Present / Absent]. Perineural invasion: [Present / Absent]. DCIS: [type and grade].

impression:
1. [Invasive carcinoma type], Grade [X], measuring [X]cm
2. [DCIS: present/absent], [grade], [extent]
3. Margins: [status]
4. Lymph nodes: [X] positive out of [X] examined
5. Biomarkers: ER [X], PR [X], HER2 [X], Ki-67 [X]%
6. [AJCC stage: pT[X] pN[X] pM[X]]
author: RadReport Templates
